objects.name: How CrowdStrike Is Accelerating Exposure Evaluation as Adversaries Gain Speed
objects.description: On April 9, 2026, cpuid.com was actively serving malware through its own official download button. Threat actors had compromised the CPUID domain at the API level and were silently redirecting legitimate download requests to attacker-controlled infrastructure. The attack ran for approximately 19 hours.

external_references.description: How CrowdStrike Is Accelerating Exposure Evaluation as Adversaries Gain Speed
